ommand
STEREO
RS 926 SD
This Is the Big Trip...
A Night to Fresh Musical Excitement
and Fascinating New Songs
Take Me Along!
with
The Ray Charles Singers
One big hit deserves a batch of encores.
The Ray Charles Singers made Take Me Along one big hit-
and now they take us along on a wonderful whirlwind trip to
other great songs.
These are the songs of today's world-the exciting, vital
songs of the world of today. They come from France where
Michel LeGrand wrote Watch What Happens, from Germany
where James Last wrote Blame It on Me.
They come from Hollywood (The Look of Love from Casino
Royale) and from Broadway (Henry, Sweet Henry, the title
song of the musical hit by Bob Merrill, who also wrote Take
Me Along ).
They come from the Top 40 charts (Then You Can Tell Me
Goodbye and Windy) and they even come from Ray Charles'
own doorstep-2 new songs for the younger generation, plus
Rays' own Summertime Sweethearts.
These are today's sounds and today's feeling expressed in
today's songs with the wonderful styling of the Ray Charles
Singers— those voices that say-
Take Me Along
AKI DIRECTOR, DANIEL PELLA
SIDE 1
TAKE ME ALONG
THE LOOK OF LOVE (from the movie
"Casino Royale"')...
SUMMERTIME SWEETHEARTS
BLAME IT ON ME
THIS HEART (Paris)
I CAN SEE IT NOW.
..Valyr Music Corp. (ASCAP)
Colgems Music Corp. (ASCAP)
Wendy Music, Inc. (ASCAP)
Helios Music Corp. (BMI)
Knollwood Music Corp. (ASCAP)
United Artists Music Co., Inc. (ASCAP)
SIDE 2
WINDY
Irving Music, Inc. (BMI)
WALKIN' LONELY
.Charloff Music Corp. (ASCAP)
HENRY, SWEET HENRY (from the musical
"Henry, Sweet Henry")
.Ampco Music, Inc. (ASCAP)
QUIZ ME
Charloff Music Corp. (ASCAP)
WATCH WHAT HAPPENS (from the movie "The Umbrellas Of
Cherbourg"')
Jon ware music & vogue Music, Inc. (BIVI)
THEN YOU CAN TELL ME GOODBYE. Acuff-Rose Publ., Inc. (BMI)
CUVER PHOTO, NORMAN TRIGG
